effect.discerning_the_eldritch.silence_p: Prevents the user from casting spells
effect.discerning_the_eldritch.metaphysi: Prevents the user from taking and dealing damage, as well as casting spells
effect.discerning_the_eldritch.mend_fles: Provides lifesteal on hit as well as healing on gaining XP
effect.discerning_the_eldritch.abracadab: Gives the user a damage cap and prevents negative potion effects from applying
effect.discerning_the_eldritch.portent_e: You feel the color around you fade.
effect.discerning_the_eldritch.accursed_: Reduces spell resistance, armor and attack damage
effect.discerning_the_eldritch.blood_rot: Reduces blood spell resistance and blood spell power, as well as damaging every 3 seconds
effect.discerning_the_eldritch.prey_poti: Ravenous jaws are summoned at your location when hit by a predator
effect.discerning_the_eldritch.predator_: Summon ravenous jaws when hitting prey
effect.discerning_the_eldritch.scorched_: Take increased damage from fire magic or if you are on fire while the attacker is holding the Soul Fire Scythe
effect.discerning_the_eldritch.ruin_poti: Take increased damage from Eldritch magic
effect.discerning_the_eldritch.auditory_: You're hearing things you know aren't there... are they...?
item.discerning_the_eldritch.bucket_of_m: It refuses to be placed down...
item.discerning_the_eldritch.tempestuous: Storm Within - Upon inflicting lightning damage, create a chain lightning on the hit target
item.discerning_the_eldritch.diary_of_de: Blood Rot - When attacked, the entity that harmed you is inflicted damage and reduced blood spell power and resist
item.discerning_the_eldritch.echo_vibrat: Provides bonus recasts for Boogie Woogie
item.discerning_the_eldritch.kings_effig: Being torn apart over and over again, is this what you want?
item.discerning_the_eldritch.amulet_of_s: The gem reflects an ancient enemy before your eyes
item.discerning_the_eldritch.ironbound_f: A beautiful brooch that feels lighter than it seems
item.discerning_the_eldritch.pyrium_shea: Scorching - On hit, ignite entities on fire for 3 seconds and deal increased damage to entities on fire
item.discerning_the_eldritch.frostbourne: Frost Touch - On hit, inflicts Chilled for 5 seconds and deal increased damage to entities with Chilled
item.discerning_the_eldritch.rift_ripper: An ancient emblem, allows you to cast Rift Walker multiple times
item.discerning_the_eldritch.razor_sheat: The Razor - On hit, spawn a group of razor blades around the victim
item.discerning_the_eldritch.starstruck_: Stardusted - On hit, create a cloud of stardust around the victim. Those who have stardust on them take extra Ender magic damage
Trancer - Eldritch and Ice spells have their mana costs halved (no cooldown) and their damage increased by 1.5x
item.discerning_the_eldritch.exorcists_a: Divine Protection - You are immune to insanity, however the costs of all eldritch spells are doubled and you have a chance to fail casted Eldritch spells
item.discerning_the_eldritch.ymir.descri: A blade forged from Eldritch dreams
item.discerning_the_eldritch.ice_spear.d: Frozen tears formed into cold vengeance
item.discerning_the_eldritch.broken_lege: An ancient blade forged centuries ago, perhaps it once had a use?
item.discerning_the_eldritch.snowgrave.d: Will you cast a spell you don't know?
item.discerning_the_eldritch.soul_fire_s: Soul Blazed - Entities on death have their souls burned. After 5 kills, all of your hits inflict soul fire. Imbued spells on the scythe are empowered.
[RIGHT-CLICK]: Send a shockwave of soul fire if there are nearby mobs, spending 5 souls to do so
item.discerning_the_eldritch.ancient_ite: An weapon forged long ago. It requires malicious energy to be reawakened.
item.discerning_the_eldritch.cataclysm_a: Zealous - Entities with over 50% of their health are inflicted with Malignant Burn, summoning smaller blades to slice them on hit
item.discerning_the_eldritch.devourer_aw: Ravenous - Entities on death are consumed. After consuming 5 entities, spew their innards on the next attack
item.discerning_the_eldritch.mourning_st: Judgement - Entities with less than 50% of their health have a 50% chance of taking mortal damage or being cursed
item.discerning_the_eldritch.broken_lege: An ancient staff constructed centuries ago, perhaps it once had a use?
item.discerning_the_eldritch.ascended_on: Contains loot from the Ascended One
item.discerning_the_eldritch.fading_scul: It looks like it can be used, but when?
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.silence.gu: Cast a wicked spell that prevents targets from casting any spell for a set amount of time
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.guardians_: A unique variant of Ray of Frost that inflicts mining fatigue
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.esoteric_e: Unleash a devastating slash of pure eldritch energy, inflicting darkness on impact
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.otherworld: Teleport and shift between reality, causing you to be unable to take any damage but also unable to deal any damage
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.conjure_ga: Conjure the legendary Gaoler, the ancient ancestor of the Warden
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.conjure_fo: Conjure multiple eldritch beings to your aid
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.call_ascen: Call The Ascended One from beyond death to challenge him to a battle
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.mend_flesh: Mend your wounds using Sculk, healing you for damage you deal and experience you take in
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.exorcism.g: Cleanse your mind and soul of the Eldritch Madness that haunts you
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.glacial_ed: Unleash a slash formed of raw ice, inflicted Chilled on impact
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.rift_walke: Carve an unstable teleportation rift using raw mana which explode after teleporting
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.abracadabr: Cast a protective spell on yourself that prevents you from being hexed as well as limiting the damage you can take
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.esoteric_s: Strike at your opponent with a hit empowered by eldritch mana
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.crystallin: Slash forwards, inflicting chilled on nearby entities. On the final slash, inflict bonus damage based on the level of chilled an entity has
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.blades_of_: Summon a flurry of blades that home in on where you gaze
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.zealous_ha: Conjure forth echoes of the Cataclysm blade to slice your opponents to shreds and afflict them with a curse
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.ravenous_r: Unleash a terrifying roar, marking nearby entities as Prey. Hitting Prey entities causes a ravenous maw to lash at them
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.soul_slice: Slash forwards, engulfing your weapon in soul fire and igniting anything it touches. Spend 2 souls per cast to enhance damage
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.soul_set_a: Charge up your scythe, creating an outburst of pure soul fire that ignites everything around it. Consume 50 souls to double damage
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.libras_jud: Judge your opponent: If they are above 50% HP, conjure the Mourning Star above them. If they are below 50% HP, immolate them in vicious flames
spell.discerning_the_eldritch.vein_rippe: Lash at your opponent, knocking them back and inflicting blood rot on them and gaining 15% lifesteal on hit.
ui.discerning_the_eldritch.extra_damage: Deals extra damage while holding a weapon in your mainhand
ui.discerning_the_eldritch.ritual_cast_f: Rituals cannot be casted in a mere spellbook
ui.discerning_the_eldritch.frozen_weapon: Deals 50% more damage if a frozen weapon is held in the mainhand
ui.discerning_the_eldritch.soul_slice_sp: Spend 2 souls per cast to add +2 damage
ui.discerning_the_eldritch.scorched_soul: Inflicted Scorched Soul effect to targets
ui.discerning_the_eldritch.libras_chance: If target is above 50% HP conjure mourning above them
If target is below 50% HP, inflict burns
tooltip.discerning_the_eldritch.cursed_i: This is a cursed item, it cannot be worn if the user is not insane
display.discerning_the_eldritch.ascended: You think you can stop me?
display.discerning_the_eldritch.presence: Your metaphysical form cannot cast spells for :
display.discerning_the_eldritch.no_insan: Insanity does not reside in your heart
display.discerning_the_eldritch.fading_s: You call, but there is no response
You call, she's coming - prepare yourself
display.discerning_the_eldritch.judgemen: Judgement Decree: Mortal Damage on hit
display.discerning_the_eldritch.apostle_: You have the nerve to beat me?
display.discerning_the_eldritch.enraged_: The boss is now enraged! Deal damage above their threshold to harm them!
The boss is now no longer enraged! Normal damage has returned!
display.discerning_the_eldritch.eldritch: You're unable to cast this dark spell...

death.attack.discerning_the_eldritch.uns: %1$s flesh was torn from their skeleton by %2$s unstable rift
death.attack.discerning_the_eldritch.cry: %1$s was turned into icy ribbons by %2$s
death.attack.discerning_the_eldritch.dev: %1$s was devoured by their own weapon

advancements.discerning_the_eldritch.roo: Delve into the untold world of Eldritch magic
advancements.discerning_the_eldritch.fin: Rediscover a Demonic Weapon from the deep cities
Obtain all Awakened Demonic Weapons from their slumber
advancements.discerning_the_eldritch.beg: Go insane after casting too many Eldritch spells
advancements.discerning_the_eldritch.tho: That's Not The Thorn Ring, Is It?
Proceed to equip The Thorn Ring
